raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"personal_attribute","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"As an AI language model, I don't have personal preferences.","distilled_fact":"The assistant is an AI language model and does not have personal preferences."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_usage","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"However, petroleum jelly can be used as a lip balm substitute as it helps to lock in moisture and prevent dryness.","distilled_fact":"Petroleum jelly can be used as a lip balm substitute because it helps lock in moisture and prevent dryness."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_effect","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"Petroleum jelly is also an effective barrier against cold and windy weather that can cause further drying and chapping of lips.","distilled_fact":"Petroleum jelly is an effective barrier against cold and windy weather that can cause further drying and chapping of lips."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_feature","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"However, if you are looking for additional benefits, such as SPF protection or natural ingredients, it might be worth considering a lip balm specifically formulated to meet your needs.","distilled_fact":"A lip balm specifically formulated to meet a person's needs may provide additional benefits such as SPF protection or natural ingredients."}]}
